reachability_artifacts: built sworn doctor and sworn baton diff runs from cmd/sworn/doctor_test.go:TestDoctorAndBatonDiffV015BinaryReachability using only a verified temporary clone of the authenticated exact-tag Git bundle beneath t.TempDir(), plus isolated fixed-umask Codex/Claude installer parity and transaction recovery fixtures

open_deferrals.item: The generic LLM check identity required by the upgraded v0.15 schema is omitted by the exact ac-satisfaction prompt.
open_deferrals.why: The exact prompt asks for verdict and findings only, while llm-check-report-v1 requires check. After the AC-04 recovery-exit repair, the raw configured ac-satisfaction response {"verdict":"PASS","findings":[]} still failed closed because it omitted check. S04 AC-04 exclusively owns requested/emitted generic-check identity; S20 AC-05 explicitly excludes requested-check matching.
open_deferrals.tracking: S04-typed-reference-ambiguity AC-04 and its fresh verifier PASS; then rerun S20 readiness and maintainability evidence.
open_deferrals.acknowledgement: The Coach directed this replan: S04 is immediately before S20; S20 remains blocked until S04 receives fresh verification, then reruns its own readiness and maintainability evidence. No S20 scope widening or synthetic report workaround is authorized.

open_deferrals.item: The configured OpenAI structured-output endpoint rejects the exact v0.15.1 generic report schema before ac-satisfaction can emit an identity.
open_deferrals.why: From a clean independent S20 semantic clone at f3da6a49c3f89f0883e265befd30d1eb099d6a90, using the newly built current T1 binary with S04's schema-constrained generic channel, the exact ac-satisfaction command exited 2: Invalid schema for response_format 'llm-check-report-v1': In context=(), 'allOf' is not permitted. The failure precedes model output, so no genuine emitted check can be compared with ac-satisfaction.
open_deferrals.acknowledgement: The controlling resume instruction requires recording this exact structured-readiness blocker and stopping rather than changing S04, the vendored prompt/schema, or synthesizing, waiving, or downgrading a report.

open_deferrals.item: The required credentialed S20 ac-satisfaction readiness smoke did not produce a locally accepted report.
open_deferrals.why: From a clean detached clone at immutable S20 semantic head f3da6a49c3f89f0883e265befd30d1eb099d6a90, using the S21-capable binary built at c52f8790eb955efed9d923b0df74e0e00b0861f6, the exact ac-satisfaction command with requested model prefix openai/gpt-5.6-sol exited 2 after 2 seconds. Per the release evidence boundary, credentials, request body, model output, and provider diagnostics were not printed, logged, or committed. The non-zero exit is therefore the durable non-secret fact: no genuine emitted check was accepted by unchanged S04 local canonical validation.
open_deferrals.tracking: Fresh provider/model readiness diagnostic through /replan-release 2026-07-15-baton-v0.15-conformance before S20 can resume
open_deferrals.acknowledgement: The controlling remedial instruction requires S20 to return to blocked and stop on any non-zero credentialed smoke result, without a retry, prompt/schema change, synthetic report, waiver, or local-install mutation.

effort_complexity.rationale: Fresh 45-path C-01 replacement after exact rollback, plus a portable clean-CI source oracle cloned from an authenticated exact upstream Git bundle, remains one indivisible bootstrap boundary.

release_benefit: Restores exact Baton v0.15.1 parity and safe installs with clean-CI proof that does not depend on Brad's filesystem.

design_decisions.choice: Treat the exact pinned upstream installers as canonical managed-tree generators and make doctor repair both supported installations in one transaction.
options: canonical installer output plus one dual-install doctor transaction
leave doctor outside the parity boundary
design_decisions.human_decision: Coach selected the orchestrator's recommendation under Brad's 2026-07-16 instruction to proceed with exact conformance and resolve Captain pins 1 through 7.
design_decisions.rationale: Installer-generated wrappers are protocol-operational bytes, and one repair authority must not leave Codex and Claude on different pins.

design_decisions.choice: Use one identity-checked embedded installer archive as the sole source for native generation, doctor checks, repair, and isolated parity.
options: read a live Baton checkout at runtime
design_decisions.human_decision: Coach selected one embedded source under Brad's 2026-07-16 standing instruction to follow the orchestrator's recommendation.
design_decisions.rationale: The mapped Sworn subset is incomplete installer input, while a live checkout or second generated source would permit authority drift.

design_decisions.choice: Publish installer-input-v0.15.1.tar inside the same repository transaction and restart-recovery set as mapped bytes and VERSION.
options: use a separately recoverable archive transaction
design_decisions.human_decision: Coach selected the single expanded repository transaction under Brad's 2026-07-16 standing instruction to follow the orchestrator's recommendation.
design_decisions.rationale: A split or unprotected archive write could leave the pin, mapped protocol, and offline installer authority at different versions after failure.

design_decisions.choice: Restore the complete pre-run agents_home, codex_home, and claude_home trees as one whole-root rollback outcome, retaining restart authority if any restoration is incomplete.
design_decisions.human_decision: Coach selected whole-root rollback under Brad's 2026-07-16 standing instruction to follow the orchestrator's recommendation.
design_decisions.rationale: Managed-path-only or independent rollback can preserve a mixed installation or lose unrelated pre-existing user content after partial replacement.

design_decisions.choice: Keep cmd/sworn thin by assigning archive generation and validation to internal/baton/installer_archive.go, install rollback and recovery to internal/baton/install_transaction.go, archive bytes to internal/adopt/baton_archive.go, and public archive parity to internal/baton/diff.go.
options: place unrelated responsibilities in manifest.go or source.go
design_decisions.human_decision: Coach selected bounded focused owners under Brad's 2026-07-16 standing instruction to follow the orchestrator's recommendation.
design_decisions.rationale: The existing doctor adapter is already 1,316 lines and neither schema manifest nor ordinary source mapping owns hostile archive or filesystem transaction semantics.

design_decisions.choice: Name 5f1dd0af59642311ee04e018a0023562d4dde008 only as the upstream root VERSION blob whose exact bytes are v0.15.1 plus LF, while separately resolving and comparing Sworn's committed internal/adopt/baton/VERSION manifest blob and parsed tag/SHA/digest on every participating ref.
options: separate upstream source identity from adopting-manifest evidence
treat the upstream blob as Sworn manifest identity
store a time-dependent Sworn manifest blob in protocol.json
design_decisions.human_decision: Coach selected the explicit two-identity contract under Brad's 2026-07-16 standing instruction to follow the orchestrator's recommendation.
design_decisions.rationale: The upstream object is exactly v0.15.1 plus LF, while Sworn requires a multi-line parseable manifest; conflating them would either break the binary or make the claimed blob impossible.

design_decisions.choice: Physically resolve agents_home, codex_home, claude_home, and recovery roots; reject equal, nested, aliased, symlinked, special-file, or recovery-overlapping topology before mutation; and durably publish complete owner-only snapshots, manifest, and sentinel before the first target replacement.
options: disjoint roots plus pre-write restart authority
best-effort rollback authority created after failure
permit aliased or nested logical roots
design_decisions.human_decision: Coach selected fail-closed root topology and crash authority under Brad's 2026-07-16 standing instruction to follow the orchestrator's recommendation.
design_decisions.rationale: Aliased or overlapping roots can overwrite one another, and recovery material created only after failure cannot restore a process killed at a publish, replace, verify, or retire boundary; sentinel presence must therefore force recovery-only execution.

design_decisions.choice: Run both isolated installer script oracles under explicit umask 0022, make native output explicitly fix directories to 0755 and regular files to 0644, and prove a hostile inherited umask cannot change the canonical tree.
design_decisions.human_decision: Implementer deterministic default accepted by Coach during the 2026-07-16 replan.
design_decisions.rationale: The tagged scripts do not set umask, so an inherited value would otherwise make the byte-and-mode oracle environment-dependent.

design_decisions.choice: Emit path-only mismatch and recovery diagnostics, with byte-sorted logical paths and no payload, credential, request, or snapshot bytes.
design_decisions.human_decision: Implementer default accepted by Coach during the 2026-07-16 replan.
design_decisions.rationale: Paths and classes are sufficient for deterministic repair while content excerpts can expose protocol or user-home bytes.

design_decisions.choice: Pull forward only an optional opaque/lossless maintainability carrier and schema-valid canned fixtures so the exact v0.15 protocol can land with a green repository gate.
options: bounded opaque carrier plus explicit fixtures
pull all S03 and S04 behavior into S02
design_decisions.human_decision: Coach selected the orchestrator's recommendation under Brad's 2026-07-16 standing instruction after an independent read-only scope audit returned BLOCKED for a fixture-only repair.
design_decisions.rationale: state.Status otherwise drops a supplied maintainability object and production Write cannot emit it, while broader lifecycle, null-semantics, and check-matching authority remains deliberately owned by S03 and S04.

design_decisions.choice: Create the reachability test's exact Baton source by verifying and cloning a committed exact-tag Git bundle, rather than adding a synthetic commit, weakening production pin checks, or using a sibling checkout.
options: archive-authenticated synthetic commit with weakened pin predicate
design_decisions.human_decision: The deterministic portable-fixture default follows the fresh Verifier's required correction and Brad's instruction to continue with the orchestrator's recommendation.
design_decisions.rationale: Production requires the exact upstream commit and tag; the 78-entry installer tar cannot reproduce those Git objects, while the pinned bundle preserves clean-CI fidelity without a runtime dependency.

positive_scenarios: Every C-01 surface is re-delivered under fresh lifecycle authority and the built-binary reachability test passes from a verified exact-tag bundle clone without any developer checkout.
negative_scenarios: Any inherited S02 authority, archive/pin drift, non-transactional install, corrupt/missing Git bundle, wrong tag/commit/tree/VERSION, or ambient /home/brad/projects/baton dependency fails closed.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: Fresh replacement plus portable proof makes exact protocol parity reproducible for users and CI rather than only on the maintainer's host.
